scope: Narrow SDK capture claims to implemented explicit capture surfaces.
supported_claims: HMAC-SHA256 element sealing and Merkle root generation
unsupported_claims: Transparent interception of OpenAI, Anthropic, HTTP, browser, or cloud SDK calls
Automatic capture of every API call or LLM invocation
Verified PyPI or npm package availability
